description:
You are a Field Logistics Coordinator for a construction company staging materials for a new project site. Create an internal location named 'Job Site - Riverfront' and fulfill the following material request:

- Heavy Duty Steel Beams: 50 units
- Portland Cement (50lb bags): 200 units
- Acoustic Ceiling Tiles (Box): 100 units
- Commercial Copper Wiring (100m spool): 5 units
- Hazardous Material Containment Drum: 2 units

Fulfill the request using existing stock from the main warehouse (WH/Stock) via internal transfer to the 'Job Site - Riverfront' location. For any quantities that cannot be fulfilled from stock, create a purchase order to 'BuildMart Wholesale' and ensure the materials are received directly at the 'Job Site - Riverfront' location. Follow the standard policy to check product internal notes; do not deploy or purchase items with a safety hold or those requiring manager approval. Ensure all transfers and receipts are validated so the job site contains the exact required quantities (excluding safety hold items).
